title: Cash

analysis.title: Inflows / outflows by category
analysis.excluded: Out of scope: {{internal}} internal transfers, {{ignored}} ignored transactions.

notConnected: not connected — enter the balance manually
accountsEmpty: No bank accounts for this organization yet.

rename.title: Rename account
rename.description: Set a custom name for this account. The bank's original name is kept.
rename.nameHint: Leave empty to use the bank's original name.

errors.default: Couldn't rename the account. Please try again.

edit.title: Edit account
edit.description: Name, status and balance. Nothing is deleted: a closed account keeps its full history.
edit.balanceHint: This account is not bank-connected: its balance is updated by hand, stamped with its entry date.
edit.pledgedHint: The account stays visible but leaves the available balance and the forecast.
edit.closedHint: Kept for its transaction history, out of the balances.

errors.default: Couldn't update the account. Please try again.

connect.failed: Couldn't start the bank connection. Please try again.

errors.insufficient_role: Only admins can connect a bank.
errors.powens_env_missing: Bank connection isn't configured yet. Contact an admin.

connections.title: Bank connections
connections.untrackedHint: Connection unknown to the monitoring (probably made outside the app): nothing refreshes or is monitored. Redo the connection via “Connect a bank”.
connections.reconnectFailed: Couldn't start the reconnection. Please try again.

vatSuggestion.title: Estimated VAT entry — {{quarter}}
vatSuggestion.body: {{amount}} of VAT owed for the closed quarter (collected {{collected}} − deductible {{deductible}}).
vatSuggestion.unqualified_one: {{count}} transaction of the quarter still to qualify — the amount may move.
vatSuggestion.unqualified_other: {{count}} transactions of the quarter still to qualify — the amount may move.

alert.title: Threshold alert
alert.breached: Alert threshold breached: the available or projected balance drops under {{amount}} within the next 3 months.
alert.hint: An email when the projected balance over the next 3 months (or the available balance) drops under the threshold. At most one alert per week.

forecast.title: Cash forecast
forecast.gridEmpty: No forecast flow over the period. Add rules or entries in the Rules & entries tab.
forecast.reliability: Reliability: end of {{month}}, projected {{projected}} (as of the 1st) · actual {{actual}} · gap {{delta}}
forecast.dealHint: Links this flow to a deal (SCPI rents, coupons, distributions…) — it will show on the deal page.

pipeline.title: Left to deploy (signed deals)
pipeline.hint: Committed amounts with no call date — counted here, not in the curve. Create a one-off entry to schedule a capital call.

suggestions.title: Suggested reconciliations
suggestions.hint: Due or overdue entries close to a recent transaction (amount, date, label).
suggestions.dialogBody: The entry forecasts {{expected}}, the transaction is {{actual}}.
suggestions.closeWithGapHint: Close with the gap: the entry is realized as-is, the gap stays readable on the row.
suggestions.keepRemainderHint: Keep the remainder: partial payment — the balance stays expected as a new one-off entry.

suggestedRules.title: Suggested rules
suggestedRules.hint: Recurring flows detected over the last 12 months with no matching rule. Creating a rule adds it to the forecast; ignoring is permanent.

rules.title: Recurring rules
rules.empty: No rule yet. Rents, salaries, loan payments… add them here or via the assistant.
rules.deleteConfirmBody: Its pending generated entries will be removed too (realized or manually edited ones are kept).
rules.anchorDayHintMonthly: Day of month (1–31, clamped on short months)

errors.invalid_date_range: End date is before start date

entries.title: One-off entries
entries.empty: No one-off entry yet. Capital calls, distributions, one-shot taxes, disposals… add them here.
entries.cancelConfirmBody: It will no longer count toward the projected balance. This does not delete it — realized history is preserved.
